languages.text: {n}Капитан Дунавски кивает вам, а затем оборачивается к людям вокруг.{/n} "{name} фон Валанциус, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана и наш{mf||а} полноправная властитель{mf||ница} доказал{mf||а} свою избранность, сразив Погонщицу! Если в ваших сердцах до сих пор сидел отросток сомнения, время вырвать его с корнем! Узрите же!"

{n}Captain Dunawski nods to you, then turns to the people gathered around.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, heir to Seberian and our rightful ruler, has proven {mf|himself|herself} by slaying the Drover! If a seed of doubt still lingers in your hearts, it is time to tear it out by the roots! Watch!"
languages.original_text: {n}Капитан Дунавски кивает вам, а затем оборачивается к людям вокруг.{/n} "{name} фон Валанциус, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана и наш{mf||а} полноправная властитель{mf||ница} доказал{mf||а} свою избранность, сразив Погонщицу! Если в ваших сердцах до сих пор сидел отросток сомнения, время вырвать его с корнем! Узрите же!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nods to you, then turns to the people gathered around.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, heir to Seberian and our rightful ruler, has proven {mf|himself|herself} by slaying the Drover! If a sprout of doubt still lingers in your hearts, it is time to tear it out by the roots! Behold!"

{n}Captain Dunawski nods to you, then turns to the people gathered around.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, heir to Seberian and our rightful ruler, has proven {mf|himself|herself} by slaying the Drover! If a seed of doubt still lingers in your hearts, it is time to tear it out by the roots! Watch!"

{n}Captain Dunawski nods to you, then turns to the people gathered around.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, heir to Seberian and our rightful ruler, has proven {mf|himself|herself} by slaying the Drover! If a sprout of doubt still lingers in your hearts, it is time to tear it out by the roots! Behold!"

{n}Captain Dunawski nods to you, then turns to the people gathered around.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, heir to Seberian and our rightful ruler, has proven {mf|himself|herself} by slaying the Drover! If a seed of doubt still lingers in your hearts, it is time to tear it out by the roots! Watch!"

languages.text: {n}Yüzbaşı Dunawski sana başını sallıyor, ardından etrafta toplanan insanlara dönüyor.{/n} "Seberian'ın vârisi ve meşru hükümdarımız {name} von Valancius, Çoban'ı katlederek kendini kanıtladı! Eğer kalplerinizde hâlâ şüphe tohumları varsa onları kökünden söküp atma zamanı geldi! İzleyin!"
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nods to you, then turns to the people gathered around.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, heir to Seberian and our rightful ruler, has proven {mf|himself|herself} by slaying the Drover! If a seed of doubt still lingers in your hearts, it is time to tear it out by the roots! Watch!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Yüzbaşı Dunawski sana başını sallıyor, ardından etrafta toplanan insanlara dönüyor.{/n} "Seberian'ın vârisi ve meşru hükümdarımız {name} von Valancius, Çoban'ı katlederek kendini kanıtladı! Eğer kalplerinizde hâlâ şüphe tohumları varsa onları kökünden söküp atma zamanı geldi! İzleyin!"

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡上尉向你点头致意，然后转向聚拢的人群。{/n}“{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，塞贝里安的继承人，我们的合法统治者，已亲手斩杀拒生花，以此证明了自己的实力！如果你们心中还存有一丝疑虑，此刻就该将它连根拔除！看好了！”
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nods to you, then turns to the people gathered around.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, heir to Seberian and our rightful ruler, has proven {mf|himself|herself} by slaying the Drover! If a seed of doubt still lingers in your hearts, it is time to tear it out by the roots! Watch!"

traits.locale_text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡上尉向你点头致意，然后转向聚拢的人群。{/n}“{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯，塞贝里安的继承人，我们的合法统治者，已亲手斩杀拒生花，以此证明了自己的实力！如果你们心中还存有一丝疑虑，此刻就该将它连根拔除！看好了！”

languages.text: {n}Captain Dunawski nickt dir zu und wendet sich dann an die Umstehenden.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian und {mf|unser rechtmäßiger Herrscher|unsere rechtmäßige Herrscherin}, hat sich bewiesen und den Treiber erschlagen! Solltet Ihr noch Zweifel in Euren Herzen hegen, wird es Zeit, ihn mitsamt der Wurzel herauszureißen! Seht her!"
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nods to you, then turns to the people gathered around.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, heir to Seberian and our rightful ruler, has proven {mf|himself|herself} by slaying the Drover! If a seed of doubt still lingers in your hearts, it is time to tear it out by the roots! Watch!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nickt dir zu und wendet sich dann an die Umstehenden.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian und {mf|unser rechtmäßiger Herrscher|unsere rechtmäßige Herrscherin}, hat sich bewiesen und den Treiber erschlagen! Solltet Ihr noch Zweifel in Euren Herzen hegen, wird es Zeit, ihn mitsamt der Wurzel herauszureißen! Seht her!"

languages.text: {n}La capitaine Dunawski vous adresse un signe de tête, puis se tourne vers l'assemblée.{/n} « {name} von Valancius, l'{mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian et notre {mf|dirigeant|dirigeante} légitime, a fait ses preuves en tuant le Chasseur ! S'il reste le moindre germe de doute dans vos cœurs, il est temps de le détruire à la racine ! Regardez bien ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nods to you, then turns to the people gathered around.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, heir to Seberian and our rightful ruler, has proven {mf|himself|herself} by slaying the Drover! If a seed of doubt still lingers in your hearts, it is time to tear it out by the roots! Watch!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitaine Dunawski vous adresse un signe de tête, puis se tourne vers l'assemblée.{/n} « {name} von Valancius, l'{mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian et notre {mf|dirigeant|dirigeante} légitime, a fait ses preuves en tuant le Chasseur ! S'il reste le moindre germe de doute dans vos cœurs, il est temps de le détruire à la racine ! Regardez bien ! »

languages.text: {n}La capitana Dunawski asiente y se gira hacia la gente allí reunida.{/n} «¡{name} von Valancius, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian y gobernante legítim{mf|o|a} de Zarkov, ha demostrado su valía matando al Pastor! Si aún queda una semilla de duda en sus corazones, ¡es el momento de arrancarla de raíz! ¡Observen!».
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nods to you, then turns to the people gathered around.{/n} "{name} von Valancius, heir to Seberian and our rightful ruler, has proven {mf|himself|herself} by slaying the Drover! If a seed of doubt still lingers in your hearts, it is time to tear it out by the roots! Watch!"

Si aún queda una semilla de duda en sus corazones, ¡es el momento de arrancarla de raíz! ¡Observen!».
